basic_details.job_title: NEIGRIHMS Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 52 Posts
basic_details.short_information: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health & Medical Sciences (NEIGRIHMS) Recruitment 2026 for 52 posts of Faculty Posts (Professor/Associate Professor/Assistant Professor). Candidates with MD/MS/DM/MCh Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 22-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through NEIGRIHMS official website.

age_limit.age_details: As per Govt. of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD/Ex-SM

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS or equivalent as per IMC Act 1956, MD/MS/DM/MCh or equivalent as per speciality, Teaching/research experience as specified per post, Registration with Central/State Medical Council

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NEIGRIHMS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health & Medical Sciences Associate Professor - Anaesthesiology

items.name: NEHU – Junior Research Fellow and Multi-Tasking Staff – 2 Posts

basic_details.job_title: NEHU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow and Multi-Tasking Staff Posts
basic_details.short_information: North-Eastern Hill University (NEHU) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Junior Research Fellow and Multi-Tasking Staff. Candidates with M.E./M.Tech, MCA or M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 24-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NEHU official website nehu.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech. in BME/IT/CSE/ECE or MCA or M.Sc. in Computer Science/Electronics with CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or selected through National level examinations, OR Graduate/Diploma in any stream.

salary_details.pay_scale: JRF: ₹37,000/- per month + HRA, MTS: ₹18,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NEHU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: North-Eastern Hill University Junior Research Fellow (JRF)

items.name: SRES-DID – District Programme Manager & Block Programme Assistant – 2 Posts

basic_details.job_title: SRES-DID Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for District Programme Manager & Block Programme Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: State Rural Employment Society- District Implementing Division (SRES-DID) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of District Programme Manager (SBM-G) & Block Programme Assistant (SBM-G). Candidates with Master Degree, Bachelor Degree Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through SRES-DID official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Master Degree in any discipline for District Programme Manager and Bachelor Degree in any discipline with computer skills (MS Office) for Block Programme Assistant.

basic_details.short_information: Assam Rifles Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in Interview for 12 posts of General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) on 04 to 08 April 2026 at Shilong. Check vacancy details, eligibility criteria, salary, selection process and interview venue information here.
